'''鈭歽-ng-l-h''' ('''kayanglehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anathematize|anathematize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-l-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anathematize|anathematize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-ng-l-h
|-
! Lemma
| kayanglehoko
|}
